api_token.description: StockData API access token, sent as the api_token query parameter. Never logged.

base_url.description: StockData API base URL override for tests or proxies.

symbols.description: Comma-separated ticker symbols. Required for quote and market data streams; optional for news filter streams.

date_from.description: Optional lower-bound date filter (YYYY-MM-DD) sent on market data requests when set.

date_to.description: Optional upper-bound date filter (YYYY-MM-DD) sent on market data requests when set.

news_uuids.description: Comma-separated news UUIDs for news_similar and news_by_uuid fan-out streams.

language.description: Optional language filter for news and source endpoints.

published_after.description: Optional lower-bound publication timestamp for news/stat endpoints.

published_before.description: Optional upper-bound publication timestamp for news/stat endpoints.

published_on.description: Optional publication date filter for news/stat endpoints.

countries.description: Optional country filter for entity stats endpoints.

interval.description: Optional interval for entity stats time-series requests.

group_by.description: Optional grouping field for entity stats requests.

sentiment_gte.description: Optional minimum sentiment filter for news/stat endpoints.

sentiment_lte.description: Optional maximum sentiment filter for news/stat endpoints.

entity_search.description: Search term required by the entity_search stream.

entity_types.description: Optional comma-separated entity type filter for the entity_search stream.

group_domains.description: Optional group-domain flag for the news_sources stream.
